body.title: Add unseen_university/channel.py — standalone channel post utility
body.result: Created unseen_university/channel.py with Postgres + JSONL fallback; 5 tests pass
body.description:
Granny and Scraps need to post to the shared channel_messages table but can't import from devices/igor/tools/channel_post.py (Igor-internal). Create unseen_university/channel.py with a standalone post_to_channel(message, author, channel) that writes to Postgres channel_messages + JSONL fallback — same pattern as Igor's implementation but with no Igor dependencies.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/channel.py (new)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, Postgres only
**Scope boundary:** IN — standalone utility with Postgres + JSONL fallback; OUT — no dedup logic in initial version (can add later)
**Test plan:** unit test in tests/test_uu_channel.py: mock Postgres, verify insert shape; verify JSONL fallback fires when Postgres fails
